zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John de Beke Lord of Eresby於1223年出生在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾斯皮爾斯比艾雷斯比時，他的父親Walter de Beke Lord of Eresby37歲，母親Eva Grey18歲。他和Sarah de Furnival至少有1個兒子和5個女兒。他去世於1301年7月18日在他的家鄉享年78歲，埋葬在英國林可爾史爾吉爾可斯亞德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John de Beke Lord of Eresby于1223年出生在英国英格兰林可爾史爾斯皮爾斯比艾雷斯比时，他的父亲Walter de Beke Lord of Eresby37岁，母亲Eva Grey18岁。他和Sarah de Furnival至少有1个儿子和5个女儿。他去世于1301年7月18日在他的家乡享年78岁，埋葬在英国林可爾史爾吉爾可斯亞德。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Beke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Flemish and Dutch: variant of   Beek  .
Hungarian (also Béke): most probably from a Hungarian form of the Turkish status name beg (see Beg ). Alternatively, it may be a pet form of a Hungarian personal name such as Benedek .

variants.name: Beek
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Ernst, Johannes, Kurt, Otto.

Dutch and North German: topographic name for someone who lived by a stream or creek, beek (compare Bek 6), or a habitational name from any of various Dutch places called Beek (in Limburg, Gelderland, and North Brabant), named with the same word.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John de Beke Lord of Eresby was born in 1223, in Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Walter de Beke Lord of Eresby, was 37 and his mother, Eva Grey, was 18. He had at least 1 son and 5 daughters with Sarah de Furnival. He died on 18 July 1301, in his hometown, at the age of 78, and was buried in Kirkstead, Lincolnshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John de Beke Lord of Eresby est né en 1223, à Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Walter de Beke Lord of Eresby, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Eva Grey, avait 18 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 5 filles avec Sarah de Furnival. Il est décédé le 18 juillet 1301, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 78 ans, et a été enterré à Kirkstead, Lincolnshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John de Beke Lord of Eresby 1223 in Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Walter de Beke Lord of Eresby 37 und seine Mutter Eva Grey 18. Er hatte mit Sarah de Furnival mindestens 1 Sohn und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 18. Juli 1301 im Alter von 78 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Kirkstead, Lincolnshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John de Beke Lord of Eresby è nato il nel 1223 nel Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Walter de Beke Lord of Eresby, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Eva Grey, aveva 18 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 5 figlie con Sarah de Furnival. Morì il 18 luglio 1301, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 78 anni, e fu sepolto a Kirkstead, Lincolnshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John de Beke Lord of Eresbyが1223年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアスパルスビーエレスビーで生まれた時，父Walter de Beke Lord of Eresbyは37歳，母Eva Greyは18歳であった。彼はSarah de Furnivalとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と5人の娘をもうけた。彼は1301年7月18日に故郷で78歳で死去し，イギリスリンコルンシュアイアキルクステアドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John de Beke Lord of Eresby(이)가 1223년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 스피스비 레스비에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Walter de Beke Lord of Eresby(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Eva Grey(은)는 18세였다. 그는 Sarah de Furnival(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1301년 7월 18일 그의 고향에서 78세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 링코실르 커크스테아드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John de Beke Lord of Eresby nasceu em 1223, em Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Walter de Beke Lord of Eresby, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Eva Grey, tinha 18 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 5 filhas com Sarah de Furnival. Ele faleceu em 18 de julho de 1301, em sua cidade natal, com 78 anos, e foi sepultado em Kirkstead, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John de Beke Lord of Eresby родился в 1223 г. в местности эресби, спилсби, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Walter de Beke Lord of Eresby было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Eva Grey, 18. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 5 дочерей от Sarah de Furnival. Он умер 18 июля 1301 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 78 лет и был похоронен в местности киркстид, линколншир, Англия.

Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 5 hijas con Sarah de Furnival. Murió el 18 de julio de 1301, en su pueblo, a la edad de 78 años, y fue sepultado en Kirkstead, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra.
